summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Rayliant NxtGen Multifactor Emerging Markets Equity ETF (RWEM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FT Wilshire Emerging Large NxtGen index. The fund tis an actively managed ETF of emerging market securities that selects stocks using multiple fundamental and technical signals based on established academic research. Machine learning models utilize these inputs to estimate expected risk-adjusted returns. RWEM was launched on Dec 15, 2021 and is issued by Rayliant.
infoTable: FT Wilshire Emerging Large NxtGen Index
